creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
As far as I am concerned, disabling the JAVA support for tier-2 archs is probably not a problem (I guess/hope nobody wants to run a puppetmaster on an ARM board).

If I read Mikael's comments correctly, the failure seems to be some "transient" problem.  If it's correct, I would prefer to ship consistent features across all architectures.  If it's not that simple, I can integrate this patch in the next facter update (I am currently testing the updated Puppet environment locally before pushing all my WIP updates to the FreeBSD ports tree).

Please keep this PR up-to-date with what you find, so that I can integrate this or not when updating.

Thanks!
Romain (with puppet@ hat)
